html:
Exclusive to:

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The Beaten Beater can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_21".

×5

Source

"trinket_21"
Exclusive to:
“This egg beater is all bent out of shape.”
–Wilson
“Every time I use it the mime pretends to ride unicycle circles around me.”
–Willow
“Is fun to crank.”
–Wolfgang
“This tool has come to the end of its life.”
–Wendy
“A DISTANT COUSIN, PERHAPS?”
–WX-78
“I have an excellent meringue recipe.”
–Wickerbottom
“It belongs in a kitchen, not in the woods.”
–Woodie
“I know when I've been beaten.”
–Maxwell
“Cööking utensils dö nöt interest me.”
–Wigfrid
“Mom had one of these.”
–Webber
“No kitchen is complete without one.”
–Warly
“Hmm... Can't use it”
–Wormwood
“Nice and mechanical.”
–Winona
“I have no idea what it does.”
–Wortox
“Scale-less have weird inventions, florp.”
–Wurt
“Whoops, it got kind of bent.”
–Walter
“It's seen better days.”
–Wanda
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.
The Beaten Beater can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_21".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Khi được trao cho Kiến Sư Tử để cống nạp, vật trang sức này sẽ làm chậm cơn thịnh nộ của nó trong 0,66 ngày.
